name: Wizard

compilation_state.summary: Wizard class successfully mapped from reference data.

description: A scholarly magic-user capable of manipulating the structures of reality.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: As a student of arcane magic, you have a spellbook containing spells that show the first glimmerings of your true power.

features.name: Arcane Recovery
features.description: You have learned to regain some of your magical energy by studying your spellbook. Once per day when you finish a short rest, you can choose expended spell slots to recover.

lore: Wizards are defined by their use of spells. They are masters of the arcane, using their intelligence to weave magic into reality.
